name: barrel-inference
description: Operate the local Barrel Inference engine from Codex: run inference, tune residency, inspect the KV cache.

interface.shortDescription: Run and tune the local Barrel Inference engine
interface.longDescription: MCP tools and an operating skill for the Barrel Inference engine: run inference, list/show/edit models, and read cache and weight-residency metrics. The MCP server is wired via ~/.codex/config.toml (see codex-config.toml).
